data.name: LabelAboutUsDescription
data.value: An eye-catching about page with parallax and scroll animations. Use this page to display general info about your app.

data.name: LabelActionChangePasswordDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelAppDescription
data.value: The most inspiring design to explore

data.name: LabelArticleCardOverlayDescription
data.value: Use this page to display either articles or documentation. It's a commonly used pattern to display an overview of items.

data.name: LabelArticleDetailCardDescription
data.value: Perfect to display any kind of content the card article page template display a modern look and feel. Perfect to show food recipes.

data.name: LabelArticleDetailVideoDescription
data.value: Perfect to display any kind of content the card article page template display a modern look and feel. Perfect to show food recipes.

data.name: LabelArticleListClassicDescription
data.value: Use this page to display either articles or documentation. It's a commonly used pattern to display and overview of items.

data.name: LabelArticleParallaxHeaderDescription
data.value: This page combines different ways to display any kind of content in a beautiful and balanced UI with an eye-catching parallax effect.

data.name: LabelArticleVideoListDescription
data.value: Use this page to display either articles or documentation. It's a commonly used pattern to display and overview of items.

data.name: LabelCalendarDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelDashboardEventDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelDashboardGridDescription
data.value: This samples showcase item templates listed in two columns. Simple but yet useful.

data.name: LabelDashboardTimelineDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelDashboardVariantDescription
data.value: This is a grid type navigation with icons, images and another data. It can be used to display different tiles to navigate to apps, pages or just to show previews.

data.name: LabelDashboardVisualDescription
data.value: This samples dashboard presents interface relevant to common data and monitoring use case.

data.name: LabelDashboardWithCarouselDescription
data.value: Navigation dashboard with a carousel view on top. It can be used to display categories, promotions or any eye-catching content.

data.name: LabelEcommerceAccountDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelEcommerceCategoryDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelEcommerceCheckoutPageDescription
data.value: If you are planning to sell anything through your app, you will probably need this template.

data.name: LabelEcommerceDescription
data.value: A beautiful and simple ecommerce app pages, featuring product detail, order confirmation, product checkout and purchase notification.

data.name: LabelEcommerceHomePageDescription
data.value: This is a perfect layout to use on any kind of store app. It includes a search field and a top area to display offers or featured products.

data.name: LabelEcommerceOrderConfirmationDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelEcommerceProductDetailDescription
data.value: This product display page has it all. If you are building an app that showcases products or services, this a must-have page

data.name: LabelEcommerceProductsDescription
data.value: Lorem ipsum dolot sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent et aliquet nunc. Sed ultricies sed augue sit amet maximus.

data.name: LabelFaceIdLogin
data.value: Enable Face ID for Log in

data.name: LabelFormChangePasswordDescription
data.value: This is a simple password recovery page. Add or remove controls or content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormDescription
data.value: A lot of samples to pick from

data.name: LabelFormFullBackgroundLoginDescription
data.value: Stylish and simple login page. Add some branding with a sample image in the background.

data.name: LabelFormFullBackgroundSignupDescription
data.value: Stylish and simple sign up page. Add some branding with a sample image in the background.

data.name: LabelFormLoginDescription
data.value: This login page is both useful and simple. Add or remove controls and content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormPasswordVerificationDescription
data.value: This is a simple password recovery step page. Add or remove controls or content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormResetPasswordDescription
data.value: This is a simple password recovery page. Add or remove controls or content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormSignupDescription
data.value: A simple sign up page to register new users into your app. Add or remove controls and content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormSimpleLoginDescription
data.value: This login page is both useful and simple. Add or remove controls and content as you need.

data.name: LabelFormSimpleSignupDescription
data.value: A simple sign up page to register new users into your app. Add or remove controls and content as you need.

data.name: LabelGiftOrder
data.value: Order this items as a gift

data.name: LabelListCardsDescription
data.value: A card style list menu is an effective way to show different categories of items.

data.name: LabelListFlatDescription
data.value: A flat style list menu is an effective way to show different categories of items.

data.name: LabelListIconDescription
data.value: This example shows a simple list menu with icons, titles and a number preview. Use it to show different categories of products, services or documents...

data.name: LabelListImageDescription
data.value: A good looking image style list menu is an effective way to show different categories of items.

data.name: LabelSocialChatDetailDescription
data.value: The kind of template that save your countless hours of design and implementation.

data.name: LabelSocialChatMainDescription
data.value: Handle the messages and notifications of your mobile app in a beautiful and simple way. Save time with messages flow.

data.name: LabelSocialContactDetailDescription
data.value: This is a simple but beautiful designed contact details page. It can be used as a profile page.

data.name: LabelSocialProfileDescription
data.value: Use this user profile page to display a bio and some key stats of a person, product or service. Use large pictures to take the best out of this.

data.name: LabelSocialProfileWithGalleryDescription
data.value: A classic among modern mobile apps. The social page layout has an overview, some key stats, a photo album, and a cool look and feel.

data.name: LabelTrendingNewsHeadline
data.value: Some of top trending news on stories from the world news channels.

data.name: LabelWalkthroughAnimationDescription
data.value: An eye-catching and interactive page to show an animation with a carousel view that animates and transitions.

data.name: LabelWalkthroughIllustrationDescription
data.value: This walkthrough page is designed to be functional almost in every app. Use it to give user a quick tour through your app.

data.name: LabelWalkthroughImageDescription
data.value: This walkthrough page is designed to be functional almost in every app. Use it to give user a quick tour through your app.

data.name: LabelWalkthroughStyle1Description
data.value: This walkthrough page is designed to be functional almost in every app. Use it to give user a quick tour through your app.

data.name: LabelWalkthroughStyle2Description
data.value: This walkthrough page is designed to be functional almost in every app. Use it to give user a quick tour through your app.

data.name: LabelWelcomeBackgroundPageDescription
data.value: Use this welcome page to briefly describe your app and give a warm welcome to new users.

data.name: LabelWelcomePageDescription
data.value: Use this welcome page to briefly describe your app and give a warm welcome to new users.

data.name: StringAppWelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Take your App to the next level with MAUI Kit.

data.name: StringAppWelcomeTitle
data.value: Ready made UI's for .NET MAUI and Xamarin.Forms.

data.name: StringBannerArticlesDescription
data.value: A beautiful way to display content.

data.name: StringBannerEcommerceDescription
data.value: A beautiful and simple ecommerce app flow.

data.name: StringBannerNewsDescription
data.value: Explore new design concept of magazine app.

data.name: StringBannerPropertyListingDescription
data.value: A simple but eye-catching property listing app idea.

data.name: StringBannerSocialsDescription
data.value: Handle the messages and notifications of your mobile app.

data.name: StringEnterReceivedCode
data.value: The confirm code was sent via email

data.name: StringEnterUsername
data.value: Enter Your Email Or Phone Number

data.name: StringGridItemTappedMessage
data.value: You have tapped a Grid Item Template

data.name: StringLoginOrRegister
data.value: Login or register using your email and password

data.name: StringMessageFeatureCommingSoon
data.value: This template will be available in next version.

data.name: StringRegisterAnAccount
data.value: Register an account to use the app.

data.name: StringRegisterNowSubtitle
data.value: Register now and enjoy the pleasures of the demo.

data.name: StringTypeEmailReceiveCode
data.value: Type your Email, we will send your verification code via email.

data.name: StringWalkthroughSubtitleStep1
data.value: To a new world of possibilities, welcome to MAUI Kit.

data.name: StringWalkthroughSubtitleStep2
data.value: Save countless hours of UI Design. Focus on what you do best.

data.name: StringWalkthroughSubtitleStep3
data.value: Learn while you do. MAUI Kit has ton of examples for you to play.
